description_long: This is a rustic wooden desk with a visibly rough texture and reinforced metal bands along the edges. The desk is cluttered with various objects, including books, a green glass retort, a brain model, a skull, candles, and a two-tiered wooden shelf holding bottles and scrolls. The front of the desk features two drawers with ornate metal handles and locks, while the top surface is heavily used and stained, suggesting frequent use for scientific or alchemical work. The wood appears aged and weathered, with a dark brown finish and visible grain patterns. The attached shelving unit on the back right corner is integrated into the desk, providing additional storage and display space for laboratory items. Overall, the desk exudes an old-world, laboratory or apothecary aesthetic, suitable for a setting involving research or experimentation.
description: A weathered wooden desk with metal reinforcements, drawers, and an attached shelving unit, cluttered with scientific and alchemical items. The surface is rough and aged, evoking an old laboratory or apothecary workspace.
description_view_0: The desk is seen from the side, highlighting the attached shelving unit with candles and a skull, as well as books and a green retort on the main surface.
description_view_1: A side view showing the curved wooden shelving and the back of the desk, with the skull and candles more prominent and the main workspace partially obscured.
description_view_2: The front view reveals two drawers with ornate handles, a brain model, books, a green retort, and the shelving unit filled with bottles and scrolls.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the books stacked on the side, the green retort, and the shelving unit, with the skull and candles visible on top.
attribute_orientation: The front of the desk is defined by the side with drawers and handles, intended to face the user, while the attached shelving unit is positioned at the back right corner.
attribute_usage_context: alchemical or scientific experimentation and study
